CONFIRM_DELETE_TEXT: Are you sure you want to delete this contact?
DELETE_ERROR: An error occurred while deleting the contact.
CONTACT_ADD_ERROR: ❌ An error occurred while adding the contact!
CONTACT_UPDATE_ERROR: ❌ An error occurred while updating the contact!
FORM_INVALID: Please fill all required fields correctly!
FIRST_NAME_MINLENGTH: First name must be at least 2 characters.
LAST_NAME_MINLENGTH: Last name must be at least 2 characters.
PHONE_INVALID: Please enter a valid phone number (10-15 digits).
EMAIL_INVALID: Please enter a valid email address.
ADDRESS_MAXLENGTH: Address can be at most 200 characters.
DELETE_SELECTED_TEXT: Are you sure you want to delete selected contacts?
LOAD_ERROR: An error occurred while loading data!
CONTACT_LOAD_ERROR: An error occurred while loading contact details!
LOGIN_NOTE: This is a demo app. You can login with any credentials.
